name: skeleton
description: Loading placeholder with text, circular, rectangular, avatar, button, card, listItem, and image shape variants.

props.name: variant
props.description: Shape preset of the skeleton placeholder

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the skeleton; accepts numbers or percentage strings. Falls back to variant-specific defaults.

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the skeleton in pixels. Falls back to variant-specific defaults.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the skeleton view

examples.label: Example 1
Example 3
examples.code:
// Button-sized placeholder in a form footer
<Skeleton variant="button" width="100%" />

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Card skeleton for an article feed
<Skeleton variant="card" />
